meaning: adj.治疗病症的,有益于健康的
examples: We successfully developed a sanative Aloe beer, which is based on Aloe and carried out on the beer product line in our college.
And that effect could be thought of as medicinal or it could be thought of as just kind of sanative - making you feel a bit better than you used to feel.
Having taken the tradition of homologous Chinese herbal and foods, our company has refined series sanative candies, which are blended with extracted of natural plants with high-tech process.
